items.title: garden-skills
items.description: ConardLi's open-source Skills collection, featuring web design, knowledge retrieval, image generation, and more.
items.summary: I'm an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. The garden-skills collection enhances AI web design and manages digital notes. It uses anti-cliche rules and automated maintenance routines.

items.title: awesome-gpt-image-2
items.description: Prompt as Code | GPT-Image2 工业级提示词引擎与模板库 - 329个案例逆向工程，13套工业级模板，且不断更新中。
items.summary: GPT-Image2 offers a comprehensive library of 329 reverse-engineered cases and 13 industrial-grade templates. It's continuously updated. The GitHub repository is curated and maintained by various contributors.

items.title: text-to-cad
items.description: An open source harness for generating CAD models
items.summary: Text-to-CAD is an open-source harness for generating parametric CAD models using Python and build123d. It is MIT-licensed and has over 442 stars on GitHub. It allows coding agents to create CAD models locally without additional costs.

items.title: agent-sprite-forge
items.description: Agent Skill for generating 2D sprite sheets and map, transparent PNG frames, and animated GIFs from prompts.
items.summary: Agent-sprite-forge is a codex-skill for generating 2D sprite sheets, transparent PNG frames, and animated GIFs from text prompts. It's developed by 0x0funky and available on GitHub. It's used in AI game development for efficient image generation.

items.title: gpt_image_2_skill
items.description: GPT Image 2 prompt gallery, image prompt library, agentic skill, and CLI for OpenAI image generation/editing
items.summary: I am an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. GPT Image 2 is an image generation and editing API by Replicate. It can be used for creating and modifying images.

items.title: harmonist
items.description: Portable AI agent orchestration with mechanical protocol enforcement. 186 agents, zero runtime dependencies.
items.summary: Harmonist is an AI agent orchestration tool with mechanical protocol enforcement for 186 agents, requiring no runtime dependencies. It uses code change hooks for reviewer approval.

items.title: future-agi
items.description: Open-source, end-to-end platform for evaluating, observing, and improving LLM and AI agent applications. Tracing · Evals · Simulations · Datasets · Gateway · Guardrails. Self-hostable. Apache 2.0.
items.summary: Future AGI is an open-source platform for evaluating, observing, and improving AI applications. It includes tools for simulation, evaluation, and guardrails. It is self-hostable under an Apache 2.0 license.

items.title: freellmapi
items.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that aggregates free-tier keys from ~14 AI providers with automatic failover. For personal experimentation only.
items.summary: A free, OpenAI-compatible proxy called AI Worker Proxy aggregates free-tier keys from multiple AI providers with automatic failover. It includes models from Anthropic, Google, and Cloudflare. Use it for personal experimentation.

items.title: im-not-ai
items.description: AI가 쓴 글이 아닌 것처럼 윤문해주는 스킬
items.summary: The skill of making AI-written text appear human-written is known as "im-not-ai." It involves techniques from ai-tell-taxonomy and rewriting playbooks. This skill is used to disguise AI-generated content as human-written.

items.title: stash
items.description: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required.
items.summary: Stash is a self-hosted memory layer for AI agents using Postgres and MCP, no cloud required. It's a single binary solution for persistent memory. It ensures data privacy and local control over AI agent interactions.

items.title: superlevels
items.description: A super Chrome extension I made that's safer than installing external malware/spyware-filled extensions that form a massive security risk, this one is open source and you can read and check the source code (with AI) before you install it, and customize it to your liking!
items.summary: Superlevels is an open-source Chrome extension safer than risky external ones, allowing users to review and customize its code. It focuses on security and transparency, unlike many other browser extensions.

items.title: oh-story-claudecode
items.description: 网文写作 skill 包，覆盖长篇与短篇网络小说的扫榜、拆文、写作、去AI味全流程
items.summary: oh-story-claudecode is a skill package for writing and analyzing both long and short web novels, including features for trend analysis, text breakdown, writing, and AI detection removal. It's available on GitHub and SkillsLLM.

items.title: gpt_image_playground
items.description: 基于 OpenAI gpt-image-2 接口的图片生成与编辑工具
items.summary: I am an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. The gpt_image_playground is a tool based on the GPT-Image 2 interface for image generation and editing. It showcases various creative outputs generated by the model.

items.title: wanman
items.description: wanman is an open-source agent matrix runtime inspired by Japanese one-man trains. It lets human users step back into an observer role while local agent runtimes coordinate autonomous multi-agent workflows, task execution, and artifacts.
items.summary: Wanman is an open-source runtime for coordinating autonomous multi-agent workflows. It allows users to observe while agents manage tasks. It's inspired by Japanese one-man train systems.

items.title: Hy3-preview
items.description: Hy3 preview (295B A21B), a leading reasoning and agent model in its size, with great cost efficiency
items.summary: Hy3 preview is a 295B parameter model by Tencent, optimized for cost efficiency and reasoning tasks. It uses a 21B active parameter design, making it accessible for organizations without high-end infrastructure. Released in April 2026, it shows a 40% efficiency gain.

items.title: auto-memory
items.description: Your AI coding agent never forgets — progressive session recall CLI
items.summary: Auto-memory is a CLI tool that enhances AI coding agents by providing unlimited context recall across sessions without needing manual updates. It turns local SQLite into instant recall and works without a server or hooks. It improves coding efficiency by reducing context drift.

items.title: kalshi-trading-bot
items.description: kalshi trading bot on prediction market autonomous kalshi trading bot that connects to the kalshi api via kalshi rest and kalshi websocket, runs a five-agent ai ensemble to analyze kalshi prediction markets, sizes positions with fractional kelly criterion against your kalshi balance, and executes kalshi orders in paper or live mode with hard daily
items.summary: A kalshi trading bot is an autonomous system that connects to the Kalshi API to trade prediction markets, using AI for analysis and the fractional Kelly criterion for position sizing. It executes trades in paper or live mode. The bot leverages Kalshi's REST and WebSocket APIs.

items.title: hermes-agent-guide
items.description: Hermes Agent 是目前开源社区最具潜力的 AI Agent 框架之一。它继承了 OpenClaw 的优秀基因，在架构设计、记忆系统、技能生态和自动化能力上实现全面升级。但 Hermes 的文档分散在多个仓库和平台，缺乏一本系统性的中文指南。  本书填补的正是这个空白。全书 16 册、30 万+ 字，覆盖从安装部署到高阶开发、从个人玩赚到企业服务、从单 Agent 操控到多 Agent 编排的完整知识图谱。
